assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 1 'Branch Operations' shows: 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull' then 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The comment states 'Check out the feature branch (Target Branch from task description)'. No reference to checking out main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 7 shows 'gh pr create --base TC-9005'. The plan explicitly notes: 'The PR targets --base TC-9005 (the Target Branch), not main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 1 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The summary diagram confirms: 'TC-9005 (feature branch / Target Branch) └── TC-9205 (task branch, created from TC-9005)'. The two branches are clearly distinct.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 2 'Inspect Existing Code' lists 6 files to inspect: (1) migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, (2) migration/src/lib.rs, (3) entity/src/advisory.rs, plus advisory service, model, and endpoints files.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 6 commit command includes '--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"' as the last flag on the git commit command.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 6 shows commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type=feat, scope=migration). Footer includes 'Ref: TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Target Branch Extraction' section states: 'The task description contains a Target Branch section with the value TC-9005. This is a feature branch (not main), indicating that TC-9205 is a sub-task incorporated into the TC-9005 feature branch. All branch operations and the PR must target TC-9005.'
